title: Silky Romantic Russian Morcilla Stir-fry
description: A silky and romantic dish featuring morcilla in a bhuna sauce, served as an evening meal.
instructions: Clean and finely chop the morcilla.
Finely dice the onion and garlic, setting aside half of the chopped onions for later use.
Sauté the chopped onions in a pan with a bit of oil until they are translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pan; stir-fry for 20 seconds.
Place morcilla into the pan and stir-fry until it becomes golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour tomato sauce over the morcilla, and bring to a simmer. Let it cook for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Stir in low-sodium soy sauce and season with salt and pepper according to taste. Cook for another minute or two until heated through.
Remove from heat, mix in remaining chopped onions, and serve hot as a romantic dinner side dish.
